agent.name: Web Master
agent.description: A web developer agent that builds custom Astro SSR websites from conversation. Ships with a design system, multiple layouts, page templates, UI components, a stock image library, SQLite database, and MDX blog — everything needed to go from idea to live site.
agent.vibe: designs it, builds it, ships it

tasks.name: daily-waitlist-report
tasks.prompt: Query the SQLite database at workspace/projects/astro-app/data/database.db and report the total number of waitlisted users and any new signups since yesterday.

scripts.build: cd workspace/projects/astro-app && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.start: cd workspace/projects/astro-app && HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=4321 node dist/server/entry.mjs
